The '''Thorn of Ryloth''' was a specialized [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] melee-weapon that was utilized by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], [[Rianna Saren]]. It was stated that [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] had these edged blades in abundance, however beyond the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], these weapons were rare and due to this, expensive off-world.<ref name="LA">''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''</ref>

==Description==
The Thorn of Ryloth was a variant of spring-knife that had double-pronged curved blades, linked together via a central frame, that was attachable to a wrist mount.<ref name="LA" /><ref name="LA Promo Art">''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' promotional material</ref> Being a electromechanical weapon, the two edged sickle-shaped blades were enveloped with cascades of energy, once engaged.<ref name="LA" /><ref name="LA Promo Art" /> As a consequence the blade attained a blue-purple coloration, with the energy itself appearing akin to lightning.<ref name="LA" /><ref name="LA Promo Art" />

==Characteristics==
Considered to be a miniature [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade, the Thorn of Ryloth was one of the several personal weapons owned by Rianna Saren. The extending blades themselves possessed the ability to become electrified once within close-quarters combat situations - with this ability engaged, the blades were enveloped with a [[Color/Legends|blue-purple]] energy discharge.<ref name="LA" /> It was able to be attached onto a wrist mount, for greater utility,<ref name="LA Promo Art" /> in addition to it being used by Saren, in tandem with her modified [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]], to dispatch combatants with lethal accuracy and efficiency. Saren's usage consisted, primarily, of two main offensive attacks - one of these attacks required her to co-operate with her [[Z-58-0]] security droid, Zeeo.<ref name="LA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Thorn of Ryloth was a weapon developed for the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'', released for the PlayStation Portable and Nintendo DS platforms, respectively. It belonged to the protagonist, Rianna Saren, who appears prevalently, within the game. With the weapon, the player has the option of two methods of attack, during engagements.<ref name="LA" />

The 'Thorn of Ryloth Combo Attack' involves Rianna to approach the opponent - it has four animations:
*Rianna passes the blade through the neck.<ref name="LA" />
*Rianna subsequently drives the blade through enemy's the abdomen.<ref name="LA" />
*Rianna trips the enemy down with her leg.<ref name="LA" />
*Rianna pierces the enemy's neck, slicing it.<ref name="LA" />

The 'Sliding Attack' - involves Rianna attaching to Zeeo and approaches the opponent:
*Rianna detches from her droid and falls with her arm outstretched, and directing her blade downward, neutralising the enemy.<ref name="LA" />

There are slight discrepancies in how the Thorn of Ryloth's shape is depicted as, across the two versions of ''Star Wars: Lethal Alliance'' - within the PlayStation Portable version, it is a straight energy blade, reminiscent of a dagger. Within the Nintendo DS version, the energy blade is sickle-shaped, which seems to be more faithful to how the weapon is shaped within promotional images created for game. The color of the blades, when electrified, are also distinctly 'more blue' within this version, than the latter. In addition, it was situated at some distance from the wrist.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
